## [00:00 - 02:12]

Hey guys, so what is an SOP? An SOP is a standard operating procedure. It's basically a super fancy name for processes. Now the reason we have this is that anytime you work with a contractor or even yourself in your business or you recruit new people into your team, there's a process, a systemized process that they can follow on how to roll out specific things in your business. Now the SOP that we provide you inside of this membership is for rolling out lead generation campaigns and in particular the rapid fire process, the rapid fire framework to validating and testing lead gen campaigns. So as you'll see here, you'll see something a little bit similar like this. It is using Trello, so you will need a Trello account and once you click on the link, you can basically make a copy of this inside of your own Trello account and you can edit it with your own requirements and your own. You may need to tweak a few things because you may have different types of people or different types of setups going on in your business. But basically what you'll see is this list here. Now what I would recommend is you add something like in progress and then completed over here so that every time you roll out a new client campaign, you make a copy of this board in the client Trello board and then your team can basically shift Kanban style. They can shift what they're working on, what has been done across. So by doing that, they're acknowledging that they've checked off everything in that particular list. And if you click on here, you'll see it's got instructions, it's got videos to view every little thing. The point of these is that it's so dumbed down in the nicest way possible that it should be very, very easy for anyone to be able to implement this kind of stuff. So this is what an SOP is. All you have to do is click on the link that's provided above this video. Now all the other videos inside of this module, you'll see a whole bunch of them disregard that. They're just linking in from this board here.
